promptSummaries: Write comprehensive Phase 1 roadmap spec covering MCP server completion and deck stability workstreams
summary: Audited mcp-server implementation state (all 4 phases coded, builds clean but SSE transport not wired in main.rs, 21 warnings), audited deck functionality (type mismatch between DeckCard type and consumers using .cardId vs .card.id, DeckDetailPage broken card lookup, localStorage-only persistence), wrote PHASE_1_ROADMAP.md spec at .claude/specs/ covering: MCP completion tasks (wire SSE, fix warnings, write tests, verify all acceptance criteria, add .claude/settings.json MCP config), deck type bug fixes, DeckDetailPage data fix, deck API persistence via rest-api extension with new decks SQLite table and Docker volume, frontend migration from localStorage to TanStack Query, Docker orchestration audit, and full deck QA checklist.

promptSummaries: Fix Google auth sign-in flow showing React Router error page when clicking Continue with Google
Audit and fix remaining v0 production release gaps
summary: Diagnosed and fixed root cause of Google OAuth error: the web SSR server (apps/web/src/server/server.ts) was not proxying /auth/* requests to the rest-api microservice, causing React Router to render an error page for unknown routes. Fixed by adding /auth/ proxy block in server.ts alongside the existing /api/v1/ proxy. Also updated apps/web/src/server/lib/routes.ts to add missing route patterns (/dashboard, /sign-in, /cards/:id, /decks/browse) for accuracy. Dev config note surfaced: GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI must be http://localhost:3000/auth/callback (not 3001) for local OAuth callback to flow through the BFF proxy and redirect back to the web app.

promptSummaries: Implement Tier 3 competitive parity features: T3-A archetype tier list, T3-B rotation calendar, T3-C CP tracker
summary: Implemented all three Tier 3 features. T3-A: migration 011 adds tier VARCHAR(2) to meta_decks; listMetaDecks returns tier; MetaDeckCard shows S/A/B/C/D badges (amber/green/blue/purple/grey); MetaDeckBrowserPage gets tier filter pills (All|S|A|B|C|D, client-side filter); seed data updated with tiers. T3-B: rotation-data.ts with ROTATION_HISTORY constant (2024-2025 + 2025-2026 seasons); RotationPage at /rotation with season selector, legal/rotated set listing by regulation mark; CalendarDays icon in Navbar. T3-C: migration 012 creates cp_entries table; cp.ts handler with GET/POST/DELETE at /api/v1/cp (authRequired); CpService.ts; CpTrackerPage at /cp (ProtectedRoute) with running total, Day2 (500) and Worlds (~1000) thresholds, progress bar, Add Event form, per-entry delete, season selector; Trophy icon in Navbar (auth-only). All routes wired in routes.tsx and ROUTES const. 133/133 tests pass, 13/13 check-types clean.
